name: Date-Nutty Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F; grease cookie sheets.
2. In a large bowl with an electric mixer on medium speed, beat the shortening, brown sugar, egg, orange juice, and vanilla extract until well blended.
3. In a medium bowl, combine the oats, flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon.
4. With the mixer on low speed, beat the flour mixture into the shortening mixture until just blended.
5. Stir in the coconut, dates, and nuts.
6. Drop the dough by rounded tablespoonfuls 2 inches apart onto the prepared cookie sheets.
7. Bake one cookie sheet at a time for 10 to 12 minutes, or until the cookies are lightly browned.
8. Cool on the cookie sheets for 2 minutes before removing to racks to cool completely.
